title: Pure Vanilla Amped
description: A Sodium based mod collection that preserves the charm of Minecraft's vanilla experience while offering subtle enhancements. Compatible with self-hosted servers.
body:
# Pure Vanilla Amped

This modpack offers a variety of improvements, subtle enhancements, and performance upgrades for the standard Vanilla version of Minecraft. The graphical user interface (GUI) has been significantly modified to provide a fresh, cohesive, and authentic experience. Most visual changes can be adjusted to personal preferences or completely removed and replaced.

![Titel Bild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c521bac87bf104c23f51b33f61bcf155fb0ad2.jpeg)

# Some highlights:

### Performance Enhancements:
- Built on Sodium: Significantly improves game performance
- Iris Shaders: Modern shader mod that provides OptiFine shader pack compatibility with Fabric
  - Offering improved performance and graphics rendering     
- Optimized for singleplayer and multiplayer:
  - BetterPingDisplay: More accurate ping information
  - Chatheads: Adds player avatars to chat
  - WaTuT Mod: Enhances multiplayer experience (GUI)
- Compatible with Distant Horizons and Nvidium (not included by default)
- Performance boosters:
  - Bobby: Extends view distance beyond server limits
  - ModernFix: Resolves performance issues
  - ImmediatelyFast: Enhances rendering speed
  - Smooth Scroll: Improves scrolling

### Visual and Audio Improvements:
- Optional animations through resource pack menu (may impact performance)
- Ambience!, Visuality & Visual Overhaul: Enhance visual and atmospheric qualities
- Particular: Adds hand-crafted visual effects for immersion
- Subtle Ambient Sound: Adds nuanced background sounds (adjustable/toggleable)
- Presence Footsteps: Realistic footstep sounds based on surface type (adjustable F10)

### Gameplay Enhancements:
- Simple Voice Chat: Proximity voice chat and group conversations
- Just Zoom: Enhanced zooming capability
- Actually Harvest: Automatic harvesting of mature crops with replanting
- Universal Graves: Creates player head marker with items upon death
- YDM's Weapon Master: Displays weapons from hotbar on player's body
- Carry On: Pick up and carry blocks and Mobs
- Ping Wheel: Pinging mechanic for improved player communication
- Xaero's Map: Comprehensive mapping with waypoint and minimap sharing
- Minecraft Essential: In-game menu for skins, friends, messaging, and server info

And much, much more!

### Additional Notes:
- GUI significantly modified for a fresh, cohesive experience
- Most visual changes can be adjusted or removed
- Further improvements and server-relevant mods list coming soon
- Check keybinds before playing

![Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/660d70b06e5b86da2cee5743494e2230ff0a890a.jpeg)
![Visual2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b45ce4b818c82df366576fa44a74f2be52f5431a.jpeg)
